wire._note: B5R FIRST MISSION — mission-pure feeds for the Bonsai Instant Citation launch: ed-tech + citation/scholarly world. All four validated at build (return <item>s). Substitution note: Education Week's generic /feed is an HTML landing page, so this uses their Technology RSS (edweek.org/technology.rss) — a real Education Week feed, on-mission. Google-News searches yielded too few items and were rejected. Keywords empty (bonsai map is disabled; heat is generic).
